pi_items.source: Task description explicit requirement and verifier logic
Task description explicit requirement and geometric definition of an equilateral gothic arch
Geometrical calculation: height of equilateral triangle with side 60 mm is 30*sqrt(3) roughly 51.96 mm
Verifier script logic checking the constraint dimensions and entity coordinates

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the agent is expected to construct a new SolveSpace 2D profile from scratch without pre-existing data. Verified the exact expected geometric parameters for an equilateral Gothic arch with a 60mm span against task instructions and verifier logic, specifically that the required radius is 60.0mm and the resulting apex height is geometrically calculated to be approximately 51.96mm. Confirmed the expected output file path and the 3.0mm tolerance constraint.
